scripts.build:agent-tools: npm run build -w @agent-tool-lite/base && npm run build -w @agent-tool-lite/file && npm run build -w @agent-tool-lite/search && npm run build -w @agent-tool-lite/shell && npm run build -w @agent-tool-lite/web
scripts.test:agent-tools: npm run test -w @agent-tool-lite/file && npm run test -w @agent-tool-lite/search && npm run test -w @agent-tool-lite/shell && npm run test -w @agent-tool-lite/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w promptpile && npm run build -w promptpile-mcp && npm run build -w promptpile-react && npm run build -w promptpile-plan && npm run build -w promptpile-compress
scripts.test: npm run test -w promptpile && npm run test -w promptpile-mcp && npm run test -w promptpile-react && npm run build -w promptpile-plan && npm run test -w promptpile-compress
